name: Bay of Fundy Salmon with Black Bean Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Olive oil with lemon essence (President's Choice Olive Oil With Lemon Essence may be used)
Commercial Black Bean and Garlic sauce (such as President's Choice Memories of Hong Kong Spicy Black Bean and Garlic Sauce)
recipeInstructions:
1. Brush the salmon (Bay of Fundy species) with a prepared mayonnaise to help retain moisture.
2. Bake, broil, or grill the salmon until just opaque in the center of the fish.
3. While the salmon is cooking, prepare the sauce by sautéing chopped scallions in olive oil and lemon juice for 30 seconds. Add sake and simmer for 2 minutes. Stir in commercial black bean and garlic sauce (or substitute with black bean sauce) and continue to simmer for 2 more minutes. Adjust seasoning with fresh lemon juice if needed.
4. Pour the prepared sauce over the salmon before serving. Serve alongside cooked rice or a rice/vegetable mixture.
